# Warranty Exclusions

Warranty exclusions cover damage resulting from misuse (drops, water exposure, or unauthorized disassembly) and any items beyond their warranty-period. Out-of-warranty items can receive paid-repair: support provides a quote, and repair starts only after you confirm it.

[Source: warranty.md#warranty-exclusions]
